title: Coastal pocket support and high-country process phase
summary: Lane 2 should deepen the new Coastal Scrub bluff pocket with content payoff, then give the high-country threshold rest one compact process-backed support seam.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the coastal bluff pocket support handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The new bluff pocket should get authored payoff while it is still fresh.

execution_order.goal: Implement the coastal bluff pocket support pack.
execution_order.why_now: A remembered place gets stronger when support surfaces reinforce it.

execution_order.goal: Review the coastal bluff pocket support pack.
execution_order.why_now: The pocket should deepen without widening the notebook.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the high-country process support handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The new tundra or treeline threshold rest should teach a living process, not just a static place.

execution_order.goal: Implement the high-country process support pack.
execution_order.why_now: A compact process seam can make the second act feel more alive without more board text.

execution_order.goal: Review the high-country process support pack.
execution_order.why_now: The support should stay visual-first and handheld-safe.

guardrails: Prefer close-look, sketchbook, or compact comparison support over longer prose.
Do not widen route-board or station copy.
